maps.Mirage: High-visibility duels, long sightlines. Favors precision/AWP. High HS potential.
maps.Inferno: Cluttered, utility-heavy. High spray frequency through smoke. Lower HS potential.
maps.Nuke: CT-Sided. Verticality. High intensity rotations. Favors defensive crosshair placement.
maps.Ancient: High foliage, medium-range duels. Favors aggressive entry-pathing and high-KPR riflers.
maps.Anubis: Wide-open mid, high-speed rotations. Favors raw Kills over tactical headshots.
maps.Dust 2: Aim-duel capital. Extremely long sightlines. Massive boost for AWPers and precision riflers.
maps.Vertigo: Close-quarters, ramp-centric duels. High trade-kill frequency. High intensity.

team_styles.Team Spirit: Aggressive Entry/Methodical Support hybrid. Powered by aggressive entry-fragging (donk) and methodical AWPing (sh1ro). High-intensity system.
team_styles.Team Vitality: Structured individualistic dominance. Led by the elite ZywOo. High-precision system with deep tactical pedigree.
team_styles.G2 Esports: Flashy/Fearless Aggression. fearless entry-fragging (malbsMd) with anchor stability (HeavyGod) and patient sniping.
team_styles.NAVI: Disciplined Methodical System. Highly structured play with youth talent revitalizing firepower alongside w0nderful and b1t.
team_styles.FaZe Clan: Tactical Individualistic. Relies on individual clutches (frozen, broky) and karrigan's mid-round tactical 'magic'.
team_styles.FURIA: Tactical Brazilian Aggression. Transitioned to a more structured, veteran-led tactical style under FalleN.

roles.Rifler: Primary engagement player. High volume of headshots and entry duels.
roles.AWPer: Sniper role. Focuses on center-of-mass kills. Naturally lower Headshot % but high survival.
